extract: This article is about the Pokémon. For the city named Illumis in French, see Lumiose City. Illumise (Japanese: イルミーゼ Illumise) is a Bug-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, it is directly related to Volbeat, evidenced by its ability to produce eggs that contain either Illumise or Volbeat.
